title: Wall Street Embraces the Dollar as Warsh’s Fed Activates Bulls
summary: The dollar is wrapping up one of its best months in a year as a raft of Wall Street banks see a turnaround of fortunes for the US currency.

title: Oil Holds Gain as Traders Weigh Hormuz Flows After Ship Attack
summary: Oil held a gain as traders weighed the outlook for a reopening of the Strait of Hormuz after a cargo ship was attacked in the waterway.

title: Asia Stocks Set for Choppy Open on Tech Volatility: Markets Wrap
summary: Stocks in Asia were set for a mixed open Friday after a volatile Wall Street session, where renewed selling in megacap technology shares offset gains fueled by resilient US economic data.

title: Permira-Backed Womenswear Retailer Reformation Files for US IPO
summary: Reformation Inc., a sustainable womenswear brand that’s backed by private equity firm Permira, filed for a US initial public offering, disclosing growing sales.

title: HB Fuller CEO: Moving Portfolio Toward Faster Growth
summary: HB Fuller CEO Celeste Mastin discusses the business of adhesives as they agree to acquire UK-listed AMS. She speaks with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)
